title: Ekspedisi Malam Tanpa Rencana
theme: Menemukan keindahan tak terduga dan kegembiraan dalam menjelajahi sudut kota yang belum pernah terjamah saat malam hari, mengajarkan bahwa keajaiban ada di setiap langkah.

cover.prompt: A softly illuminated studio apartment interior at 2 AM. A digital clock displays glowing numbers beside an open laptop on a desk. An ergonomic chair is positioned in the foreground or midground. The ambient light from the screen creates a gentle atmosphere, evoking a sense of quiet accomplishment after a long period of focused work. Emphasis on objects and the serene environment.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Anya, a freelance graphic designer, decides to take an unfamiliar shortcut home after a late-night project. She discovers a hidden mini-park in a secluded alley, an 'Oasis Tersembunyi' adorned with DIY lights and recycled art, where local youths are enjoying music. This unexpected urban adventure brings her inspiration and a fresh perspective on life.
